# Pay-per-Pick Inquiry — Nordhafen Fulfillment GmbH

From: Anna Becker, CFO, Nordhafen Fulfillment GmbH, Hamburg
To: UNIFI Deal Desk
Subject: Inquiry for Pay-per-Pick offer — new pick line in Hamburg

Dear UNIFI team,

We are evaluating a Pay-per-Pick offer for our new pick line in our Hamburg fulfillment center. Nordhafen Fulfillment is a mid-market e-commerce fulfillment provider with around 80 million euro in annual revenue. The new line is part of a capacity expansion to handle our growing customer base.

The line will run 10 robots, handling roughly 2 million picks per month. Our package mix is balanced: 60 percent light items below 1 kg, 30 percent medium items between 1 and 3 kg, and 10 percent heavy items above 3 kg.

We expect a moderate Q4 peak — about plus 20 percent over baseline volume for around 8 weeks each year, driven by holiday-season e-commerce. The rest of the year is fairly steady.

We would prefer a 5-year contract term. Flexibility is medium-priority for us: we want predictable monthly cost, but we also want some headroom to adjust if our volume forecasts come in different than expected. We are not asking for a complete lock-in.

Please provide a structured offer covering price per pick, expected monthly cost, contract clauses you would recommend for our profile, and how this compares to a classical leasing arrangement on a cash-flow basis.

Best regards,
Anna Becker
CFO, Nordhafen Fulfillment GmbH
